title: Japanese-Style Lamb Kebabs
description: A fusion of Japanese and Turkish flavors, these lamb kebabs are perfect for a summer evening. Marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, sake, and spices, they're grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, brown sugar, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot with pide, if desired.
